scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix apps/backend && npm install --prefix apps/frontend
scripts.db:init: npm --prefix apps/backend run prisma:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:init:test: npm run db:create:test && npm run db:migrate:test
scripts.test:e2e: npm run db:init:test && npm --prefix apps/backend run test:e2e
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/backend run build && npm --prefix apps/frontend run build
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix apps/backend run start:dev" "npm --prefix apps/frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:setup: npm run env:copy && npm run db:up && npm run db:verify && npm run db:init && npm run build && npm run dev
scripts.env:copy: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path='apps/backend/.env'; if(!fs.existsSync(path)){fs.copyFileSync('.env.example', path); console.log('Created apps/backend/.env')} else {console.log('apps/backend/.env already exists')}"
